title: Exercises: Vulnerable Systems Assessment
description: Hands-on exercises to assess and prioritize quantum-vulnerable systems

exercises.title: Migration Priority Calculator
exercises.description: Build a system that calculates migration priority based on multiple risk factors.
exercises.task: Create a scoring system that considers data sensitivity, retention period, update difficulty, and cryptographic risk.
exercises.starterCode:
def calculate_priority_score(system: dict) -> dict:
    """
    Calculate migration priority score for a system.

        system: dict with:
            - name: str

            - retention_years: int
            - update_difficulty: 'easy'|'medium'|'hard'|'very_hard'
            - user_base: int (optional)
    
    Returns:
        dict with score, priority_level, and breakdown

hints: Shor-vulnerable algorithms get highest crypto score
Long retention + high sensitivity = higher priority
Difficult updates mean you need to start earlier
